/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared      -fno-stack-protector  -Xlinker -z -Xlinker now -fPIC -shared -lgcc -Wl,--hash-style=both -Xlinker -T -Xlinker "/home/unina/Scrivania/Progetto/client1/build_clean/client_cleancalls.ldscript" -Wl,-soname,libclient_cleancalls.so -o libclient_cleancalls.so CMakeFiles/client_cleancalls.dir/client_cleancalls.c.o  /home/unina/Scaricati/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0-1/ext/lib64/debug/libdrmgr.so /home/unina/Scaricati/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0-1/ext/lib64/debug/libdrcontainers.a /home/unina/Scaricati/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0-1/lib64/debug/libdynamorio.so
